title: block_range_construction test is a roundtrip oracle
description: wallet/src/client.rs test block_range_construction constructs a BlockRange with start height 100 and end height 200, then reads those same heights back and asserts they equal 100 and 200. This is a pure roundtrip with no independent oracle: the struct is set then read, which trivially passes by Rust's type system. It does not test serialization, deserialization, or any behavior of get_block_range(). Per CLAUDE.md test oracle discipline this type of test is explicitly prohibited. The test should be removed or replaced with a test that encodes a BlockRange to proto bytes and checks the wire encoding against a known vector.
